response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-01:40: Identified the performance of an original song titled 'Soar' by VTuber Marai Rui (魔雷レイ). The lyrics are transcribed from the video as no official lyrics were found online. 2. 01:40-02:30: Identified as an ending card scene with no vocal music.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a live vocal performance by the VTuber Marai Rui of her original song 'Soar', followed by an ending card.

scenes.description: VTuber Marai Rui performs the original song 'Soar' on a virtual stage. The performance includes singing and dancing. The song ends, followed by a brief spoken message to the audience.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
もっと輝くよ そうだろう 叫べばいい
憧れより眩しい歌 そして激しい歌
いつか耳を塞いだ その両手がきっと翼になる そう思うんだ
ゆずれない衝動
高く飛べるよ そうだろう
抑えられない
羽ばたく理由を誰かに許されなくても
もう決めたよ 迷わない
向かい風もきっと進んでる証拠だって
君に伝えるんだ
何度でも君を呼んで また歩いてゆく
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
It will shine more, right? You should shout it out.
A song more dazzling than longing, and a fierce song too.
The hands that once covered my ears will surely become wings, I think so.
Uncompromisable impulse.
I can fly high, right? I can't hold it back.
Even if I'm not allowed by anyone to spread my wings.
I've already decided, I won't get lost.
Even a headwind is proof that I'm moving forward.
I'll tell you.
I'll call you again and again, and walk on.

scenes.description: The performance concludes and the video transitions to an ending card with text. No vocal music is playing.
